title: Framework package contains only framework
context: The runtime is generic; the domain lives in specs users author. Existing development-era specs (31 .agent.yaml) are disposable per AX-002. The framework package should not conflate framework code with example specs.
decision: @davidorex/pi-jit-agents package contains only framework code: agent-spec.ts, template.ts, compile.ts, jit-runtime.ts, types.ts, and schemas that are part of the framework contract itself (e.g. verdict.schema.json for the phantom-tool pattern). No production agent artifacts shipped. Minimal test-fixtures only.
consequences: Existing 31 .agent.yaml specs stay in consumer packages or get deleted per P2 disposability
Framework package ships with zero production agent artifacts
Test fixtures under test-fixtures/ excluded from dist/
